title: Ubiquiti FiberPoE G2, Optical Data Transportfor Outdoor PoE Devices
description: UBNT FiberPOE is low-cost, Gigabit, opto-metalic outdoor Converter , which in addition to transferring data from an optical fiber to a metallic cable can also power via PoE. Compared with the first generation, it can handle a larger larger temperature range (-40 up to 60°C) FiberPOE includes two Ethernet ports, one SFP slot and DC terminal. For the power supply are 3 options: the first is the DC terminal, the second and the third is via RJ45 ports. The converter can be powered from 1st or 2nd Ethernet port, but only one can transmits data + poe. All three options work in a voltage range 16 to 50V DC
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SFP LAN speed (1) 1000Mbps Optical interfaces (1) 1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 24V DC, 50V DC Power type PoE, DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 1,5 Power via connector/terminal 16 .. 57V DC
